nasb.text: “As for you, lie down on your left side and lay the iniquity of the house of Israel on it; you shall bear their iniquity for the number of days that you lie on it.

esv.text: “Then lie on your left side, and place the punishment of the house of Israel upon it. For the number of the days that you lie on it, you shall bear their punishment.

cnv.text: “你要向左邊側臥，承擔以色列家的罪孽。你向左邊側臥多少日子，你擔當他們的罪孽也是多少日子。

ccb.text: “你要向左侧卧，担当以色列人的罪恶。要用你向左侧卧的天数担当以色列人的罪恶。
